artifact_type.description: Artifact class used by the public governance corpus.

status.description: Lifecycle stage used by the public governance corpus.

visibility.description: Visibility scope supported by the governance model.

classification.description: Publication classification used for automated routing.

owner.description: Individual or team accountable for the document.

applies_to.description: Describes the repo contexts or teams that should adopt the artifact.

source_basis.description: Human-readable summary of the dominant source family.

source_manifests.description: Preferred as a YAML list of manifest filenames used as references.

alignment_mode.description: Describes how the artifact relates to the source material.

updated.description: Date the artifact was last refreshed.

applies_to_detail.description: Optional narrative for filtering or gating.
